name: DOLLAR TREE, INC.
summary: PART I General We are a leading operator of retail discount stores operating under the brand names of Dollar Tree and Dollar Tree Canada. At January31, 2026, we operated approximately 9,000 stores across 48 states and the District of Columbia and approximately 275 stores across seven Canadian provinces.
